prompt: Create a vibrant anime-style full-body illustration of a fashionable young woman on a midnight stroll through a futuristic neon city, centered in the frame and floating or stepping midair with one knee bent and one boot extended downward. She has very long flowing black hair with violet and hot-pink ombré ends, glossy highlights, and wind-swept strands streaming to the right; her face is intentionally soft-blurred and featureless like a privacy blur. Dress her in a cropped white sleeveless button shirt, loose black bomber jacket slipping off the shoulders with pink lace-up details on one sleeve, black cargo jogger pants with pockets, straps, a belt, silver chain accessories, a purple thigh strap, white slouch socks, and chunky black lace-up boots. Add punk streetwear jewelry: rings, bracelets, ear piercings, and small metal accents. The background is a deep purple night skyline with scattered glowing particles like snow or city sparks, soft bokeh lights, and five prominent neon sign elements: one tall rounded pink Japanese-style sign on the left, one vertical pink sign with Japanese-style characters near the lower center, one tall pink sign behind her on the right, one cyan vertical sign reading GUNAD, and one low foreground building sign made of bright cyan and pink horizontal bars. Use saturated magenta, violet, cyan, and electric blue lighting, strong rim light on the hair and jacket, clean cel-shaded anime rendering, crisp line art, luminous gradients, cinematic depth of field, and a dynamic urban night atmosphere. Overall mood: cool, dreamy, rebellious midnight fashion.
